mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2% increase in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over 6 months signals rising demand and inflation expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decrease in the unemployment rate over 3 months signals improving labor market conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2% increase in industrial production over 6 months signals improving supply-side conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 1% increase in housing starts over 3 months signals improving demand-side conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decrease in the federal funds rate and a 1% increase in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over 6 months signal a monetary easing cycle with rising inflation expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decrease in the unemployment rate and a 1% increase in payroll employment over 3 months signal improving labor market conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 1% increase in real GDP and a 0.5% decrease in the unemployment rate over 6 months signal improving demand-side conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite positive signal.
